free_text: Measurement of the gamma-ray multiplicity spectra,
the alpha-value of 239-Pu in the energy range 2-2150keV
and of a resonance self-shielding effect in
the alpha-value of 235-U, 239-Pu in the 4.65-2150 eV
Conf.Proc. ND2011 in Tsukuba. Data confirmed.
Graphs of alpha only - for resolved resonances and
Reactor IBR-30  in booster mode at
average thermal power 10 kWt, pulse repetition rate
consisting of two 40 liter tanks, each
consisting of aluminum cylinder 40 cm diameter, 40 cm
length, 2 mm thick al walls. Scintillating liquid is
the mixture of 86% tholuol and, to 94% enriched in
neutrons filters were used. Those of sodium  and
indium were placed at 122m flight base and those of
aluminum  and cobalt were placed at 500m flight base.
Maximum value of correction for background is 10%.
M.M. TABLE was added in STATUS lines in
some Subents. Free text was corrected to be "human-
readable".One data point was added in Subents 006,007.
according to the memo CP-D/791 ( N.Otsuka,S.Dunaeva) .
